action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed with TypeError - mask has dtype int64 which PIL can't handle. Analysis: The mask loaded from PNG is int64 after the label remapping (subtracting 1, mapping 0 to 255). Need to cast to uint8 before PIL resize. Decision: Fix the dtype issue in train.py and re-run.
